title: tragia betonicifolia
intro: Tragia betonicifolia is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the Betony-spurge or Indian spurge. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, including wounds and ulcers. Tragia betonicifolia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used in topical applications to treat skin issues.
